ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the trip was taken */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the trip was taken */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the trip took place */,
  "time_caught" TEXT /* Time of day when fishing started */,
  "duration_min" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in minutes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the trip */,
  "trip_type" TEXT /* Type of the trip (e.g., morning, evening) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "general_location" TEXT /* General area of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "regulations" TEXT /* Fishing regulations for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the condition is associated with */,
  "air_temp_f" REAL /* Air temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "water_temp_f" REAL /* Water temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "wind_speed_mph" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "wind_direction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wind direction */,
  "water_clarity" TEXT /* Clarity of the water */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_wind_direction_id FOREIGN KEY ("wind_direction_id") REFERENCES wind_directions ("wind_dir_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catches" (
  "catch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each catch */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the catch is associated with */,
  "fish_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of fish caught */,
  "fish_length_in" REAL /* Length of the fish in inches */,
  "water_depth_ft" REAL /* Depth of water where the fish was caught */,
  "catch_method" TEXT /* Method used to catch the fish */,
  "catch_image" TEXT /* Image of the catch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_catches_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_catches_fish_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fish_type_id") REFERENCES fish_types ("fish_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fish_types" (
  "fish_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fish type */,
  "fish_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fish type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the fish type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fish_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_users" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_directions" (
  "wind_dir_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind direction */,
  "wind_dir_name" TEXT /* Name of the wind direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_dir_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the log entry is associated with */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_logs_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)
